text:
I can't advise on dosing — that needs to come from Mira's pediatrician, especially with a fever that's been running for two days and drowsiness alongside it. Please call your pediatric office or nurse line right now; they'll want to know her weight and can tell you the right dose for ibuprofen (or whether acetaminophen is better in her case), and they may also want to see her given how long the fever's been present and how sleepy she is.

What you're describing — persistent fever plus unusual sleepiness — is worth a same-day check-in rather than waiting.
